name: Mushroom and Cheddar Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Fresh shitake mushrooms, stems removed, sliced
1 1/4 cup Packed grated sharp Tillamook cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover porcini with hot water and soak for 30 minutes. Drain.
2. Melt butter in a heavy large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add shitake mushrooms and green onions, and sauté until tender and beginning to brown, about 5 minutes.
3. Gradually mix in broth and milk. Add porcini. Bring to a simmer, stirring frequently.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer until thick, stirring occasionally, about 20 minutes.
5. Add cheese and stir just until melted. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Garnish with parsley and serve.
